data.title: Portage Community Bank mourns passing of Chief Lending Officer, Eric M. Decker. Jan. 20, 2026, Ohio.
data.description: Ravenna, Ohio - On January 20, 2026, Portage Community Bank (PCB), a bank subsidiary of Portage Bancshares, Inc. (PBI), shared the unfortunate news of Eric M. Decker's passing. Decker served as the Senior Vice President and Chief Lending Officer (CLO) at PCB. The organization expressed deep sorrow at the loss of Mr. Decker.

ARMSTRONG STILL OPTIMISTIC ON U.S. CRYPTO BILL Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong says Congress can still pass a comprehensive crypto law, even after he withdrew support for last week’s draft. He opposed the version stalled in the Senate over concerns it favored traditional finance

data.title: AltaSea adds Andrew Zimmern and Ashlan Cousteau to Board of Trustees in LA, influential figures to join the board in 2026.
data.description: In Los Angeles, AltaSea at the Port of Los Angeles, known as the world's top tech hub for the Blue Economy, reported the addition of acclaimed chef Andrew Zimmern and environmental journalist Ashlan Cousteau to its Board of Trustees. Zimmern, an Emmy and Four-Time James Beard Award winner, along with Cousteau, will commence their board roles in the initial meeting of 2026. The esteemed duo will bring their expertise in advocacy and education to further the organization's mission.

data.title: Trump Media & Technology Group Corp. (NASDAQ: DJT) stock is up as they outlined plans for digital token initiative with 2026 cut-off date.
data.description: The stock of Trump Media & Technology Group Corp. (NASDAQ: DJT) saw an increase in trading on Tuesday as the company revealed details about its digital token project. The company, which operates Truth Social and Truth+, has set February 2, 2026, as the deadline for its newly introduced digital tokens. Shareholders are required to have a minimum of one token by that date to participate. Trump Media & Technology stock has been experiencing significant growth, indicating strong investor interest in the initiative. For more information, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Protext Mobility, Inc. (OTC: TXTM) plans to uplist with Deloitte's help, enhancing its readiness for growth.
data.description: Protext Mobility, Inc. (stock symbol: TXTM) is excited to announce a significant development, making progress towards meeting requirements for potential listing on a higher stock exchange, through an initial engagement with Deloitte.

data.title: Sakrete commemorates 90 years with Amerimix at World of Concrete 2026, showcasing legacy in construction industry.
data.description: In Las Vegas on January 20, 2026, Sakrete, the original bagged concrete mix brand, along with sister brand Amerimix, showcased its significant history in aiding residential and industrial building and construction. As a leader in the industry, Sakrete is commemorating its 90th anniversary, affirming its longstanding commitment to providing high-quality products for various construction needs.

data.title: Cordatus Capital acquires ETAS through Red Dot Buildings in Mineola, TX. ETAS makes metal building components.
data.description: In a recent development on January 20, 2026, Cordatus Capital ("Cordatus") and Red Dot Buildings ("Red Dot") have successfully completed the acquisition of East Texas Architectural Sheetmetal ("ETAS"). ETAS, headquartered in Mineola, TX, specializes in the production of metal building components such as purlins and roofing materials. This acquisition marks a significant move within the industry and demonstrates the ongoing consolidation trend. The financial figures and other specific details of the acquisition were not disclosed in the announcement.

data.title: BitMine's ETH holdings soar to $14.5B, owning 4.203M ETH (3.48% of total) at $3,211/token. Stock plunges 7%.
data.description: BitMine Immersion Technologies Inc. (NYSE: BMNR) saw a 7% drop in stock value, despite announcing ownership of 4.203 million Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH), which accounts for 3.48% of the total ETH in circulation. The company's total crypto and cash holdings amount to $14.5 billion as of January 19. This includes holdings of 4.203 million ETH valued at $3,211 each, 193 Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC), $22 million in Eightco Holdings (NASDAQ: ORBS), and $979 million in cash. In the past week alone, BitMine acquired 35,268 ETH. This aggressive accumulation strategy continues despite the stock price plummeting by 80% from its peak of $140 in June. BitMine now possesses 3.48% of Ethereum's total supply of 120.7 million tokens, which puts them close to Chairman Thomas "Tom" Lee's goal of acquiring 5% of all ETH. Despite the stock's decline, shareholders voted in favor of management's proposed share increase.

data.title: Muinzer promotes Steve Teegarden to CFO. Teegarden will oversee all financial operations.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, in Chicago, Muinzer, a prominent real estate investment and management company specializing in student housing, disclosed the appointment of Steve Teegarden as the new Chief Financial Officer. Mr. Teegarden will now be responsible for managing all financial activities within the firm.

data.title: Entegris' CFO Linda LaGorga steps down effective Feb 28, 2026. Mike Sauer to take over as Interim CFO from March 1, 2026.
data.description: Shares of Entegris, Inc. (NASDAQ: ENTG) experienced a decline on Tuesday following the announcement that Linda LaGorga will be resigning from her position as Chief Financial Officer through mutual agreement, effective as of February 28, 2026. After her departure, Mike Sauer, who currently serves as the company's Vice President, Controller, and Chief Accounting Officer, will step in as the Interim CFO starting from March 1, 2026, while still handling his existing responsibilities. LaGorga will remain at Entegris in the capacity of Senior Advisor until May 15, 2026, in order to facilitate a seamless transition. Entegris President and CEO, Dave Reeder, expressed gratitude to the outgoing CFO for her contributions, noting her significant role in the organization.

data.title: Ademi Firm probes if RAPT Therapeutics is giving a fair price to shareholders in deal with GSK plc.
data.description: Ademi LLP is currently conducting an investigation into RAPT (NASDAQ: RAPT) regarding potential breaches of fiduciary duty and other legal violations related to its recent agreement with GSK plc. The probe aims to assess the situation thoroughly. To participate in the investigation and access more information, individuals are encouraged to visit the provided link.

data.title: RainFocus introduces RainFocus Nexus - a secure, cloud-agnostic system of specialized AI agents to assist event marketers.
data.description: In LEHI, Utah, on January 20, 2026, RainFocus™, a leader in event marketing platforms, introduced AI agents aimed at assisting in decision-making, managing intricate setups, and ensuring compatibility with current enterprise systems. These intelligent agents aim to enhance efficiency in organizations and offer adaptable solutions.

data.title: Marksman Titan Security Group acquires Priebe Security Services in Central Texas, expanding presence, elevating service excellence.
data.description: Austin, Texas - On January 20, 2026, Marksman Security Services, LLC, a subsidiary of the Marksman Titan Security Group, a prominent national security services company in the United States, has successfully acquired Priebe Security Services. This acquisition marks a significant step in the growth of Marksman Titan Security Group and enhances their position in the industry.
